chatDialogueBox.welcomeMessage: {{firstName}}, how can I help you today?

predefinedWelcomeMessages: What can I do for you today?
Need assistance? I'm here to help

exportChat.successNotification: Your chat has been successfully downloaded

dragDrop.title: Add Files
dragDrop.description: Drop your files here to add them to the conversation

errors.textTooLong: Text is too long to convert to speech
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later
errors.generalError: An error occurred. Please try again

welcome.title: 🎨 Image Creator Integrated!
welcome.description:
This feature has been integrated into DSB Chat.
Describe what you want to create and AI will generate an image for you.

imageCreator.prompt: Generate a modern illustration of a Danish train at sunset.

welcome.title: 📃 Document Chat Integrated!
welcome.description:
This feature has been integrated into DSB Chat.
Upload PDF file to analyze, summarize, or extract information from it

docChat.prompt: Analyze the content of the document and summarize the key points clearly.

welcome.title: 📃 Meeting Notes Integrated!
welcome.description:
This feature has been integrated into DSB Chat.
Upload meeting transcription to generate structured action items and meeting summaries.

meetingNotes.prompt: Generate actionable notes and a structured summary from the meeting transcript.

welcome.title: 📃 Document Converter Integrated!
welcome.description:
This feature has been integrated into DSB Chat.
Upload a PDF file to convert it into searchable format.

docConverter.prompt: Convert the uploaded file into a searchable PDF
